logic_gaps.description: reduce-state.cjs has no code paths to process documented `userPaused` and `stuckRecovery` event types listed in state_format.md §3 stopReason enum (lines 382-407); reducer only handles `resumed`/`restarted` lifecycle events at lines 389/441

reduce-state.cjs normalizes blockedBy array entries generically (lines 807-823) but does not validate against the 4 documented gate names (dimensionCoverageGate, p0ResolutionGate, evidenceDensityGate, hotspotSaturationGate) from state_format.md §3 lines 319-329

reduce-state.cjs reads only `compositeStop` from convergenceSignals at line 745; ignores documented `rollingAvg` (weight 0.30) and `madScore` (weight 0.25) signals from state_format.md §3 lines 229-238, making it impossible to compute the documented weighted convergence score

reduce-state.cjs has zero implementation for graphEvents array processing (grep across 1657 LOC returns no matches), breaking the coverage-graph integration contract documented in state_format.md §3 lines 242-294 (event payload shape + namespace rules)

reduce-state.cjs deltaRecordToFinding function (lines 505-541) reads only `findingClass` at line 538; does not read or preserve documented required findingDetails fields `scopeProof` and `affectedSurfaceHints` from state_format.md §3 lines 203-204 and 226 — fields are silently dropped during reduction

reduce-state.cjs has zero implementation for traceabilityChecks field processing (grep across 1657 LOC returns no matches), breaking the protocol-integration contract documented in state_format.md §3 lines 421-447 (protocol execution result schema)

reduce-state.cjs implements comprehensive search-depth processing — `searchCoverage` (lines 924-931, 939-952), `searchLedger` (lines 955-996), `reviewDepthSchemaVersion` (line 934) — that is not documented in state_format.md iteration-record schema (§3 lines 166-447); reducer features ship without canonical spec coverage

reduce-state.cjs finding registry uses findingId (line 311) for deduplication; has zero implementation of content_hash computation or two-tier deduplication algorithm documented in SKILL.md §8 lines 514-538; grep for content_hash returns zero matches in the reducer

novel_findings: The drift pattern is systemic: the documented spec at state_format.md §3 describes a richer event/field/signal model than the reducer implements. The reducer is essentially a v1 implementation while the docs describe a v2 contract.

The reducer's actually-implemented `searchCoverage` / `searchLedger` / `reviewDepthSchemaVersion` triplet (LG-0007) suggests there IS a v2 contract being built — but in code, not in docs. Future packets should reconcile in the doc-leading direction OR the code-leading direction explicitly.

All 8 gaps fall under ADR-002 surgical-edit-scope exclusion (reducer is bug-scan-only). They must be merged into resource-map.md Phase-5 Augmentation for follow-on packets rather than fixed in this cleanup release.
notes: First iteration of phase-5 deep-research loop. RQ scoped to documentation-code drift in scripts/reduce-state.cjs. Surfaced 8 substantive drift gaps, all novel against spec.md and audit-findings.jsonl. cli-devin SWE-1.6 wall-clock 93 seconds. Recipe strip-down (verification_enabled / bayesian_scoring_enabled / fallback_chain removed — devin binary v2026.5.6 rejects custom contract fields; sequential_thinking enforced via user-scope MCP + system_instructions mandate).
